arts.ttl: Why Aston Villa Will Feel Assured if They Land PSG’s €20M-Rated Outcast
arts.sum: With the January transfer window open, Paris Saint-Germain has an opportunity to offload players who no longer fit their plans, and Marco Asensio appears to be one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has diminished significantly. The former Real Madrid star has lost his starting spot and barely featured as a substitute. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Predicts Whether Arsenal Will Sign Striker Amid Interest in €65M-Rated Man Utd, PSG Target
arts.sum: With Paris Saint-Germain deciding to move on from Randal Kolo Muani, they must secure a new No. 9 to partner with Gonçalo Ramos in the attack at some point, whether in January or next summer.
